FreeBSD ololo 9.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE #0 r243825: Tue Dec  4 09:23:10 UTC 2012     root@farrell.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

>Description:
PECL PHP driver for Tarantool/Box
>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	php5-tarantool
#	php5-tarantool/pkg-descr
#	php5-tarantool/pkg-plist
#	php5-tarantool/distinfo
#	php5-tarantool/Makefile
#
echo c - php5-tarantool
mkdir -p php5-tarantool > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - php5-tarantool/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >php5-tarantool/pkg-descr << 'b0ff59479dfac91bf6bfc8bf3a655ba1'
XPECL PHP driver for Tarantool/Box
X
XWWW: https://github.com/mailru/tarantool-php
b0ff59479dfac91bf6bfc8bf3a655ba1
echo x - php5-tarantool/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >php5-tarantool/pkg-plist << 'c0d7abdc3b6f41c51696e771ce2470b1'
Xinclude/php/ext/php_config.h
X@dirrmtry include/php/ext
X@dirrmtry include/php
X@dirrmtry lib/php
c0d7abdc3b6f41c51696e771ce2470b1
echo x - php5-tarantool/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >php5-tarantool/distinfo << '0a1a9e6c6d8cc52d6d710681ad720daa'
XSHA256 (tarantool-20130513.tar.gz) = abb128d47512348aa7b7840986a65f776230d77f00f78fee06b7d25041c727e6
XSIZE (tarantool-20130513.tar.gz) = 20854
0a1a9e6c6d8cc52d6d710681ad720daa
echo x - php5-tarantool/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >php5-tarantool/Makefile << '4962aa93002f64e3a291d82e860f99a7'
X# Created by: Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=	tarantool
XPORTVERSION=	${TR_VER}
XCATEGORIES=	databases
XMASTER_SITES=	GH GHC
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	php5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	g.veniamin@googlemail.com
XCOMMENT=	PECL PHP driver for Tarantool/Box
X
XUSE_PHP=	yes
XUSE_GITHUB=	yes
XUSE_PHPEXT=	yes
XUSE_PHPIZE=	yes
XDEFAULT_PHP_VER=5
X
XPHP_MODNAME=	${PORTNAME}
XGH_PROJECT=	${PORTNAME}-php
XGH_ACCOUNT=	zloidemon
XGH_COMMIT=	427bcbb
XGH_TAGNAME=	master
XTR_VER=		20130513
X
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-tarantool
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
4962aa93002f64e3a291d82e860f99a7
exit
